Chanel CF Beige
Full name Classic Flap
Size: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Material: Original Factory Haas fine ball Caviar
Hardware: 24K Light Gold Plating
The classic CF has a charm that makes people fall in love at first sight. It is a moving elegant label wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe. Paired with a gold buckle, it is exquisite and luxurious, truly a luxury entry-level choice everyone should see~
